heroSection.powering: Integrate the best of AI technology

featuresSection.title: Ready to cover your needs
featuresSection.description: From AI consulting to full-stack development, we deliver robust, ready-to-integrate solutions tailored to your business.

ai.title: AI
ai.description: We integrate AI into your business processes by developing AI agents or agentic AI, capable of autonomous task orchestration. Agents can run on your internal GPU infrastructure or be cloud-hosted, with full respect for data privacy.

vibeCoding.title: Vibe coding
items: Full PRD documentation, ready for internal handover

techStack.title: Tech stack
techStack.description: We build both intuitive UIs and robust backends. Our default stack (not exclusively though) is full TypeScript, from backend APIs (Node, NestJS) to frontend apps (React, Angular, Next.js). Whatever your needs, we deliver production-grade systems — fast and secure.

legacySection.title: Legacy projects
legacySection.description: Foundational products we built before Completium — still shaping how we design and ship software today.

edukera.name: Edukera
edukera.description: Created in 2014, Edukera developed an online educational application to teach mathematics using the formal proof assistant Coq (developed by Inria). Since its commercial launch in 2016, the Edukera application has been used successfully in several universities by 8,500 students who have solved over half a million exercises.

archetype.name: Archetype
archetype.description: Archetype is a general-purpose language to develop smart contracts on the Tezos blockchain, with exclusive features to ease development, testing, and formal verification. Designed for business logic clarity, it brings rational types, explicit execution conditions, and state machine patterns to on-chain applications.
